title: kubeadm Configuration (v1beta4) — Etcd
text:
Appears in:
ClusterConfiguration
Etcd contains elements describing Etcd configuration.
Field
Description
local
LocalEtcd
local
provides configuration knobs for configuring the local etcd instance.
local
and
external
are mutually exclusive.
external
ExternalEtcd
external
describes how to connect to an external etcd cluster.
